creator: hiren@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am seeing a similar issue on a bhyve VM I created with FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20160217-r295683-disc1.iso snapshot. 

I rebuild kernel and it started happening.

dtrace: failed to compile script ./tcpio.d: "/usr/lib/dtrace/io.d", line 42: operator -> cannot be applied to a forward declaration: no struct devstat definition is available
